summary.tldr: The team discussed the API integration, dashboard mockups, onboarding email verification, engineering wiki, performance issue, and cross-meeting analytics. The API integration is complete, dashboard mockups are approved, and the onboarding email verification copy is being implemented. The team also identified a performance issue with the dashboard load time and a new feature request for cross-meeting analytics.

topics.title: API Integration
topics.summary: The team discussed the API integration, which is now complete and has been shipped to staging. The reporting module is still deferred to v1.1, but the core integration is done. Bob got client sign-off on the scope change, and the client is fine with deferring reporting as long as the dashboard is solid.
topics.supporting_quote: The API integration is complete as of yesterday.

topics.title: Dashboard Mockups
topics.summary: The team discussed the dashboard mockups, which have been updated with larger font sizes and better contrast. The client approved the revised mockups within the hour. The dashboard mockups are now closed.
topics.supporting_quote: Fonts are larger, contrast is better.

topics.title: Onboarding Email Verification
topics.summary: The team discussed the onboarding email verification step, which is still confusing users. The copy changes are ready but haven't been implemented yet. Bob will implement the copy changes today, and Carol will draft the email template for the reminder by Wednesday.

topics.title: Engineering Wiki
topics.summary: The team discussed the engineering wiki, where Bob added the API dependency lesson learned under the process improvements section.

topics.title: Performance Issue
topics.summary: The team discussed the performance issue with the dashboard load time, which is around four seconds on a cold load. Bob will investigate and profile the queries this week, and Carol will prepare a fallback demo script that avoids the slow screens just in case.

topics.title: Cross-Meeting Analytics
topics.summary: The team discussed the client's request for cross-meeting analytics, which is a new feature request that was not in the original scope. Carol will put together a static mockup of the cross-meeting analytics screen for the demo, and the team will build the real version after launch.

speaker_observations.speaker: Alice
speaker_observations.observation: Alice's tone is positive and directive throughout the meeting.

speaker_observations.speaker: Bob
speaker_observations.observation: Bob's tone is positive and informative, providing updates on the API integration and onboarding email verification.

speaker_observations.speaker: Carol
speaker_observations.observation: Carol's tone is positive and collaborative, providing feedback on the dashboard mockups and onboarding email verification.

summary.tldr: The Q2 planning meeting covered the API delay issue, design review, onboarding flow, and team retrospective. The team decided to reduce the scope of the project by deferring the reporting module to v1.1. They also discussed the design review, onboarding flow, and team retrospective, assigning tasks to team members.

topics.title: API Delay Issue
topics.summary: The team discussed the API delay issue from last week. They decided to reduce the scope of the project by deferring the reporting module to v1.1. This decision was made to ensure the project stays on track despite the delay. Carol will update the project timeline to reflect this change by end of day tomorrow. Bob will notify the client about the scope change and get their sign-off by Friday.
topics.supporting_quote: Agreed. Decision made ΓÇö reporting module deferred to v1.1.

topics.title: Design Review
topics.summary: The team reviewed the design mockups for the new dashboard. The client liked the color scheme but wanted larger fonts. Bob will update the mockups with the font size changes and have revised versions ready by Wednesday.
topics.supporting_quote: I can update the mockups with the font size changes. I'll have revised versions ready by Wednesday.

topics.title: Onboarding Flow
topics.summary: The team discussed the onboarding flow, which has been receiving feedback that it's confusing. They decided to add a clearer prompt at the third step and maybe an email reminder if users haven't verified their email within 24 hours. Carol will draft the copy and email template for this by Tuesday.
topics.supporting_quote: We should add a clearer prompt at that step and maybe an email reminder if they haven't verified within 24 hours.

topics.title: Team Retrospective
topics.summary: The team held a retrospective on the sprint, which was rough due to the API issues. They decided to build in more buffer time for external dependencies to avoid similar delays in the future. Bob will document this as a lesson learned in the engineering wiki by next Monday.
topics.supporting_quote: The API issues slowed us down more than expected. We should build in more buffer time for external dependencies.

speaker_observations.speaker: Alice
speaker_observations.observation: Alice's tone was positive and directive throughout the meeting.

speaker_observations.speaker: Bob
speaker_observations.observation: Bob's tone was neutral and collaborative, with some positive moments.

speaker_observations.speaker: Carol
speaker_observations.observation: Carol's tone was neutral and informative, with some moments of conflict.
